name: Subsurface Conduit
oracle_text: When ~ enters, overclock. (Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)\nYou may cast instant and sorcery cards exiled this way until end of your next turn.
flavor_text: The deeper shafts pulse with something older than civilization. I can feel it calling to me — and when I listen, knowledge floods in. Terrible, delicious knowledge.

validation_errors: Oracle text contains what looks like reminder text: "(Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)"
Combined oracle + flavor text is 356 characters, exceeding the 350-char limit for this card type

design_notes: UB signpost uncommon for Deep Descent archetype. Overclock triggers on entry, exiling three cards and allowing instant/sorcery cards to be cast until end of turn. The second ability extends the window to end of next turn, creating a window for flashback-style plays and milling synergy. 2/2 body is clean and efficient at uncommon. Flavor emphasizes the alien knowledge of the Anomalous Subsurface Environment. Signals the archetype's core identity: playing cards from exile, graveyard interaction, and taking calculated risks for powerful effects. No keyword noncombos — enters tapped (via Overclock) is irrelevant to a creature that doesn't tap. The card pays off the archetype's payoffs in Limited: mill matters, exile-to-cast synergies, and instant/sorcery density.
